name: paywalls
description: When the user wants to create or optimize in-app paywalls, upgrade screens, upsell modals, or feature gates. Also use when the user mentions "paywall," "upgrade screen," "upgrade modal," "upsell," "feature gate," "convert free to paid," "freemium conversion," "trial expiration screen," "limit reached screen," "plan upgrade prompt," "in-app pricing," "free users won't upgrade," "trial to paid conversion," or "how do I get users to pay." Use this for any in-product moment where you're asking users
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 用来制作和优化应用内付费引导界面的工具，适合在试用到期、功能受限或需要促使免费用户升级的场景，解决用户不愿掏钱、转化率低的问题。
